_metadata.description: Consolidated higher-ed patterns: Content management systems (higher-ed specific)

Cascade CMS.description: Hannon Hill Cascade CMS for higher education. Cascade is a decoupled CMS that publishes static HTML — no runtime traces appear in standard deployments. Detection is only possible when in-context editing (ICE) is enabled (data-cascade attributes) or if templates reference hannonhill.com assets. Confidence is low by design; treat any match as requiring manual verification.
Cascade CMS._detection_note: Decoupled CMS — frontend detection unreliable. Matches should be manually verified. No JS globals, meta generator, or path fragments exist in published output.

Modern Campus CMS.description: Modern Campus CMS (formerly OU Campus / OmniCMS by OmniUpdate) content management system for higher education.
Modern Campus CMS._validation: Data-mined vs BuiltWith (UNI-141, 2026-07-13). 'omniupdate' (their own brand asset host a.cms.omniupdate.com DirectEdit link + omniupdate.css + OU XSL namespace) = 86% recall, 0/279 FP. REMOVED 'modern.*campus'/'omniupdate.*modern'/bare 'moderncampus' html + 'modern.*campus' scripts: matched 'modern campuses' PROSE on 32.6% of random non-MC sites (verified in HTML: North East Scotland College 'a number of modern campuses'). Also dropped 'omni' js global (too generic).

TerminalFour.description: TerminalFour content management system for higher education.
